title: cinnamomum zeylanicum var. deschampsii
intro: Cinnamomum zeylanicum var. deschampsii is a plant species that is commonly known as Ceylon cinnamon or true cinnamon, which refers to the inner bark of the tree being harvested and dried to create the spice. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ceylon cinnamon include its ability to regulate blood sugar levels, aid in digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Ceylon cinnamon can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or oil, and is often used in traditional medicine and as a spice in cooking and baking.
